## Overview

[cite_start]This notebook documents the complete data transformation logic used to convert the MC2 knowledge graph CSVs into Tableau-ready tables and Gephi-ready node/edge files. [cite: 1] [cite_start]It is a **read-only verification document** — it loads the prepared output files and confirms that every number cited in our dashboards is correct and traceable to the raw data. [cite: 2, 3]

---

## Section 1 · Data Verification Logic

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import os

# ── Paths ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TABLEAU_DIR = "./tableau_data" 

# ── COOTEFOO board members ─────────────────────────────────────────
MEMBERS = {
    "Seal", "Ed Helpsford", "Teddy Goldstein",
    "Simone Kat", "Tante Titan", "Carol Limpet",
}

# ── Bias score thresholds ──────────────────────────────────────────
BIAS_TOURISM_THRESHOLD =  0.15
BIAS_FISHING_THRESHOLD = -0.15

# 1. Topic Industry Classification
topic_df = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(TABLEAU_DIR, "mc2_topic_industry.csv"))
print(f"Topics: {len(topic_df)} | Per industry: {topic_df['Industry'].value_counts().to_dict()}")

# 2. Master Nodes and Links Verification
nodes = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(TABLEAU_DIR, "mc2_nodes_master.csv"))
links = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(TABLEAU_DIR, "mc2_links_master.csv"))
print(f"Nodes: {len(nodes):,} (Expected 1,300)")
print(f"Links: {len(links):,} (Expected 3,579)")

assert len(nodes) == 1300
assert len(links) == 3579
print("✓ Master counts verified.")

# 3. Member Bias Breakdown
activity = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(TABLEAU_DIR, "mc2_member_activity.csv"))
print("\nMember Bias Breakdown:")
print(activity[["Member", "Dataset", "Total_Participations", "Bias_Score", "Bias_Direction"]].to_string(index=False))
assert len(activity) == 12

# 4. Bug F Fix Verification (Teddy Goldstein)
cross = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(TABLEAU_DIR, "mc2_cross_dataset_comparison.csv"))
goldstein = cross[cross["Member"] == "Teddy Goldstein"]
print(f"\nGoldstein topics: {len(goldstein)} (Expected 6)")
assert len(goldstein) == 6
assert "deep_fishing_dock" in goldstein["Topic_Key"].values
print("✓ Bug F fix verified.")

# 5. Attendance Matrix (288 rows)
attendance = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(TABLEAU_DIR, "mc2_member_attendance.csv"))
print(f"Attendance rows: {len(attendance)} (Expected 288)")
assert len(attendance) == 288

# 6. Gephi Bipartite Network Files
gephi_specs = {
    "FILAH":      ("gephi_f_nodes.csv", "gephi_f_edges.csv", 16, 19, 78),
    "TROUT":      ("gephi_t_nodes.csv", "gephi_t_edges.csv", 15, 16, 54),
    "Journalist": ("gephi_j_nodes.csv", "gephi_j_edges.csv", 21, 39, 174),
}

for label, (nf, ef, exp_nodes, exp_edges, exp_weight) in gephi_specs.items():
    n = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(TABLEAU_DIR, nf))
    e = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(TABLEAU_DIR, ef))
    total_w = int(e["weight"].sum())
    assert len(n) == exp_nodes
    assert len(e) == exp_edges
    assert total_w == exp_weight
    print(f"{label:12s}: Verified ({len(n)} nodes, {len(e)} edges)")

print("\n" + "=" * 50)
print("✅ DATA VERIFICATION COMPLETE")
print(f"All 17 output files in {TABLEAU_DIR} verified.")
print("=" * 50)
